name: The Permission Nightmare (v1)
title: The Permission Nightmare (v1)
description: Experience the nightmare of maintaining complex permission queries across multiple systems, and discover how a simple ERB policy makes it effortless
author: ERB Team

scenes.title: Permission Problems Solved
scenes.summary:
Complex permission queries scattered across your codebase are a maintenance nightmare.

With ERB, one simple policy:
  project.owner_email = current_user.email

...generates consistent, correct permissions everywhere.
lessons: Complex permission queries = N places to update for every rule change
Scattered logic = inconsistent behavior and security risks
ERB policy = one definition, guaranteed consistency
Simple declarative rules are easier to audit and verify
Rule changes become 5-minute tasks, not multi-day emergencies
